programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, 89, has acute abdominal pain. Niall, 10, has broken his arm falling from a tree.

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team uncover the secrets in our supermarket trolleys. First up, the frozen aisle, from chips to ice cream. And why do frozen ready meals have best-before dates.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet mechanic Adrian in Worcestershire. Simon restores a wrecked armchair into punk rock furniture.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex, owned by Galia and Michael. But what will their guests make of the 9pm curfew.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William host at their five-star gold-rated B&B, 38 St Giles in Norwich, where their guests have the ride of their lives on the race track and are blown away by breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fun-loving Ann and Bill host at their four-star B&B in Bude, north Cornwall, with Cornish cream tea, a local stick dance, a drink in their garden shed, and 'weekday caviar'.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Diane and Max are the last to host, at Ombersley Bed & Breakfast in Worcestershire, where there's bickering over gluten-free bread and hand washing, and some underwhelming eggs.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: University lecturer Amanda Sherratt hosts a Japanese evening, including a raw fish starter and sumo wrestling for entertainment.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retail manager Ali Roberts plans a refined night of gourmet cuisine and fine dining. But will Alex's outrageous tales ruin the elegant atmosphere.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmer Chris Moore hosts a beetroot bonanza, injecting the root vegetable into every part of his night, while also shocking his guests with his hidden talents.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre student Jack Stone steps into the spotlight with a 'creative' evening, including DIY pizzas. But Alex steals the show with her shocking outfit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Geordie Alex Coxon gives her guests a taste of her home 'Toon', on a night featuring glamorous glad rags, kitchen chaos and a surprising secret past.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Harri and Claire welcome their rivals to the Vale of Berkeley Guesthouse in Gloucestershire, where they line up some bird-watching bingo for their guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Justin and Charlie host at the Artist Residence in Penzance. Most of their guests like the quirky, art-filled rooms, but a hair-raising shower dampens some spirits.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Alec and Craig's award-winning Edenfield Guesthouse in Blackpool, Craig unleashes his cabaret-star alter-ego, Cybil Du Vaux, on his unsuspecting guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stacey and Spencer host at The New Inn at Portland in Dorset. There's sandcastle building, water fights and breakfast hampers, but Claire accuses Stacey of alienating her guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a week of water fights, shower frights and cabaret nights, the B&Bers meet up for one last time to find out how much they've been paid and who's won.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two sets of family planners: civil partners Ally and Jo in south London, and Steve and Jo in Cardiff. Did the two couples find the right nests.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Poole, Sue and Roy are at an impasse over their four-bed chalet bungalow, complete with a pool! Roy loves the space they have, but Sue's ready to downsize.

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: As the snow falls just a few days into January, work continues to fit the floors and electrics. And the family battle to protect their pregnant sheep.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Sam, who's 19, is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. Raheem, who's seven, has a cut wrist.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Daisy, who's 22 months old, has serious injuries after being kicked in the head by a racehorse at her family's stables. And Florence, who's 100, may have had a stroke.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Chris suffers multiple injuries after a quad bike accident near Penrith. Cyclist Vivienne is in a bad way after her bike leaves the road on a notorious Cumbrian pass.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Sam, who's 19, is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. Raheem, who's seven, has a cut wrist.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Daisy, who's 22 months old, has serious injuries after being kicked in the head by a racehorse at her family's stables. And Florence, who's 100, may have had a stroke.

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped: Fruit & Veg Aisle
programme.desc: The team get the inside info on summer veggies in winter, temperamental bananas, and how to waste less produce.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys head to Wokingham in Berkshire to meet professional gardener Mark, whose barns are bursting with bikes, bric-a-brac and baggage.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Windsor, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet Roy, whose garages are stacked full of bikes. Henry picks the one that doesn't work, and Simon converts some wooden beams into lamps.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dan and Mardi Leonard host at their funky Brighton B&B, Guest and the City, where the guests have mixed reactions to the contemporary decor and stained-glass windows.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Farmer's Boy Inn in Gloucestershire, pie entrepreneur Phil sets his guests a pie-making challenge. In the morning, the group work up an appetite for breakfast on the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane welcome their first-ever guests aboard their brand-new, purpose-built hotel boat, the Geanna, and pull out all the stops with a champagne cruise along the Thames.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: There are high hopes for Sarah and Jean-Pierre's B&B, Sentry Mead. The hosts serve a five-star dinner and breakfast, but Jane feels mugged off and Phil's not keen on the towels.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. But some of the hosts' emotions run away with them.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Enthusiastic business consultant James plans a complex Italian menu, a 1960s Italian dress code and a fun photoshoot. But he spends most of the night in the kitchen.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former mental health nurse Ronnie Imlah shocks her guests with a revelation about her past, and guests JP and Amanda don't see eye to eye over plastic surgery.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: JP Goodyear-Martinez treats his guests to Jamaican food, on a night of wacky wigs, alarming Lycra outfits and a hula-hooping drag queen.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Football coach and first-time cook Tim Travers plans an American menu, with his mum on the other end of the phone to help him every step of the way.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: There are high hopes for recruitment consultant Amanda's sophisticated evening. But an accident at the table has her guests in hysterics.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nina and her husband Andy welcome their rivals to their Scandinavian-style accommodation, The Old Stables in Somerset, where some guests are dubious about the no-shoes policy.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Morris hosts at Rigsby's Guest House in Hertford. His attempt to entertain his guests at a local zoo isn't a hit with everyone and a breakfast hold-up doesn't go down well.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Erica put on some classic Blackpool fun for their guests at The Fairway, as they take on some local zombies in a horror walk.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Robin welcomes his rivals to the converted Dent Station in the Yorkshire Dales, where he's organised a butchery competition. A few home truths about the group are revealed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time to confront their critics and find out how much they've been paid. And some of Robin's petty marks over the week are thrown to the group for discussion.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, Kirstie helps Sadia and Sohail break the shackles of flat-living, while Phil's with Freya and Elliot, who are set on exclusive enclaves - in a fast-moving market.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, Gary and Bill are torn over their four-bed home set in the grounds of a graveyard. Bill loves its quirkiness, but Gary hates the higgledy-piggledy layout.

programme.title: Bill Bailey's Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian Bill Bailey explores the epic, extraordinarily beautiful state of Western Australia - from stunning beaches to tugboat racing it's a once-in-a-lifetime voyage down under.

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Limboland
programme.desc: In Limboland, somewhere between expectation and reality, Bill ponders the true meaning of happiness with his trademark wit, musicality - and a remarkably downbeat version of Happy Birthday.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode is about the importance of powerful and resilient bonds. Cyril, who's 91, has been in a car crash. Five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Lawrence, who's 26, has been thrown 15 feet after being hit by a car. Angela, who's 63, was attacked by one of her cats as she shouted at a fox in her garden.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hartlepool, the heli-medics treat a man who's been hit by a train. Cyclist Trevor suffers serious injuries after a collision. And in Cumbria, a biker needs emergency surgery.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode is about the importance of powerful and resilient bonds. Cyril, who's 91, has been in a car crash. Five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear.

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped: The Snacks Aisle
programme.desc: How many mangoes are in a dried mango pack? The team also crack the secret of caramel popcorn and the mystery of snowballs' fluffy centre.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.
